inputs.name: row
inputs.description: Row values to append. Accepts either an ordered array of strings or an object mapping that will be converted to ordered values.

outputs.name: appended
outputs.description: True when one row was appended successfully; false otherwise.

outputs.name: sheet_id
outputs.description: Spreadsheet ID used for the append operation.

outputs.name: row
outputs.description: Echoed row values attempted or appended by the connector.
